title: Did Google Just Fall Behind Again?, WWDC Preview, Anthropic Files To Go Public
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss whether Google is falling behind competitors like OpenAI and Anthropic in AI development. The conversation covers AI agents as a potential reshaper of web and app usage, Apple's WWDC plans, and Anthropic's path to IPO, framed as an analysis of power shifts in tech.
